evidence: Local Scoop extras/anaconda3 exists and uses /InstallationType=JustMe /NoRegistry.
Chocolatey package source added under packaging/chocolatey/anaconda3.

no_admin.strategy: Use the upstream package-manager route; do not duplicate package logic locally unless upstream route fails no-admin policy.

scoop.no_admin_strategy: Use upstream Scoop extras/anaconda3; it passes JustMe, NoRegistry, and user-writable destination arguments.

chocolatey.no_admin_strategy: Chocolatey package source runs the official installer in JustMe, NoRegistry mode with destination under $toolsDir.

readiness.decision: Upstream Scoop remains covered; repo-local Chocolatey package source added, pending isolated current-user install proof.
